description: Configuration parameters for creating a new Bulk API 2.0 query job.
name: QueryJobRequest

operation.description: The query operation to perform. Use query to retrieve active records only, or queryAll to include soft-deleted and archived records.

query.description: The SOQL query to execute. The query result will be available as CSV data after the job completes.

contentType.description: The format of the results. Currently only CSV is supported.

columnDelimiter.description: The delimiter character used between fields in the CSV output.

lineEnding.description: The line ending character used in the CSV output.
